parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "plan_tier": "suspended",
  "launchpad_access": false,
  "nova_os_access": false,
  "ai_tools_limit": 0,
  "automation_systems": 0,
  "priority_support": false,
  "white_label": false,
  "updated_at": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.createdAt }}"
}

={
  "user_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.userId }}",
  "user_email": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.email }}",
  "stripe_customer_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.customerId }}",
  "dispute_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.disputeId }}",
  "charge_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.chargeId }}",
  "amount": {{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.disputeAmount }},
  "currency": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.currency }}",
  "reason": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.reason }}",
  "reason_display": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.reasonDisplay }}",
  "status": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.status }}",
  "stripe_dispute_url": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.stripeDisputeUrl }}",
  "evidence_due_by": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.evidenceDueBy }}",
  "plan_tier": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.planTier }}",
  "created_at": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.createdAt }}"
}
